title: Newegg Investor Relations - Annual Reports and SEC Filings
text:
Newegg Commerce Investor Relations - Annual Reports and SEC Filings.

Investor Information Available: Newegg maintains an investor relations website with comprehensive financial information including annual reports, quarterly earnings releases, and SEC filings (10-K, 10-Q, 8-K).

Latest Annual Report (FY2025): The most recent comprehensive annual report covers fiscal year ended December 31, 2025, reported on April 28, 2026. Key highlights include 16.9% revenue growth to $1.44B and profitability improvement with net loss reduced to $4.9M from $43.3M in FY2024.

Quarterly Reports: The company files quarterly 10-Q forms providing detailed financial statements, MD&A (management discussion and analysis), and risk factor disclosures.

Corporate Governance: Investor materials include proxy statements, board composition, audit committee structure, and executive compensation details.

Key SEC Filings to Review: 10-K Annual Report (comprehensive financials and risk factors). 10-Q Quarterly Reports (most recent: Q1 2026, due in May 2026). 8-K Current Reports (material events and press releases).

Forward Guidance: Management's most recent guidance indicates 2026 net sales of $1.23B-$1.47B and return to profitability with net income of $6.1M-$15.7M.

Access: All materials are available free on the investor relations website and via SEC EDGAR database.
